subcodes.title: Words spoken ca. Oct. 1911
subcodes.first_line: The Divine Reality is far removed from man. It is absolutely remote and independent in Its essence; abstract, limitless, impersonal beyond human comprehension
subcodes.subjects: @The Holy Spirit, @spiritual transformation, @Manifestation of God as sun, @Manifestation of God as mediator, @Word of God and human limitations, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @transmutation of the soul by the divine elixir
